/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/air_lab_interfaces/srv/detail/execute_tst__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/air_lab_interfaces/msg/detail/goal__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/air_lab_interfaces/msg/detail/goals__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
